scripts.build:css:cache-bust: grunt template:website_css template:large_flags_overrides_css template:homepage_css template:docs_css template:playground_css
scripts.build:css:min: cleancss -o build/css/website.css build/css/website.css && cleancss -o build/css/playground.css build/css/playground.css && cleancss -o build/css/homepage.css build/css/homepage.css && cleancss -o build/css/docs.css build/css/docs.css
scripts.build:css: npm run build:css:sass && npm run build:css:cache-bust && npm run build:css:min
scripts.build:esbuild:templates: grunt template:lookup_country_js template:right_to_left_js template:angular_component_js template:react_component_js template:playground_js
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run fetch-stats && npm run copy && npm run build:css && npm run build:esbuild && npm run build:vue && npm run build:svelte && grunt template --env=dev && npm run replace && npm run strip-comments
scripts.build:prod: npm run clean && npm run fetch-stats:prod && npm run copy && npm run build:css && npm run build:esbuild && npm run build:vue && npm run build:svelte && grunt template --env=prod && npm run replace && npm run strip-comments
